title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
summary: Chase AI presents 17 Claude plugins, CLIs, and skills organized by category: design, productivity, and data. The tools include web scraping (Firecrawl), RAG systems (LightRAG), automation (Playwright CLI), and integrations with GitHub, Stripe, and Supabase, intended to enhance Claude Code workflow efficiency.
writeup: Chase AI walks through 17 Claude plugins, CLIs, and skills organized into three categories: design, productivity, and data. The lineup covers web scraping with Firecrawl, RAG systems with LightRAG, browser automation with the Playwright CLI, and integrations for GitHub, Stripe, and Supabase. The throughline is extending Claude Code with external tools to streamline development workflows.
